# WayOfProcessing

> International Stripe payment processing from 1.5%

WayOfProcessing helps businesses accept payments worldwide via Stripe.

## Summary

- Service: Stripe payment processing, warmed accounts, company + bank + Stripe setup
- Commission: from 1.5%
- Uptime: 99.9% with Payment routing failover
- Experience: 7 years with Stripe, 1100+ accounts, $53M+ client volume
- Withdrawals: EUR, USD, USDT and more
- Languages: Russian (/ru, default), English (/en)
- Contact: hello@wayofprocessing.com, Telegram @wayofprocessing
- Disclaimer: WayOfProcessing is independent and not affiliated with Stripe, Inc.

## Key pages

- Home (RU): /ru
- Home (EN): /en
- Blog (RU): /ru/blog
- Blog (EN): /en/blog
- Privacy (RU): /ru/privacy
- Privacy (EN): /en/privacy
- Contact form: /ru/#kontakt or /en/#kontakt
- Blog RSS: /ru/blog/feed.xml, /en/blog/feed.xml

- /ru/blog/what-is-stripe-scaling-business — Что такое Stripe и масштабирование онлайн-бизнеса
- /ru/blog/stripe-international-payments-integration — Интеграция Stripe для международных платежей
- /ru/blog/international-payments-for-business — Приём международных платежей для бизнеса
- /ru/blog/stripe-payment-routing-uptime — Payment routing в Stripe: аптайм 99.9%

## Services

1. Turnkey infrastructure: foreign entity, bank account, Stripe account
2. Payment processing for any niche from 1.5%
3. Warmed Stripe accounts with turnover
4. Payment routing with automatic failover
5. Free expert consultation and 24/7 Telegram support
